description: Marketing event pages with session naming + schema file - multiple disconnected TSX/TS files
rationale: Call-graph analysis: multiple .tsx event pages and schemas.ts have no shared function call or import relationships. Each file forms an independent component = 3+ components = ERROR.
notes: Previously pass under domain-based classification (all files mapped to single UI domain). Call-graph approach reveals these files are structurally independent despite being in the same visual domain.
